<user_query>
You are handling a `/sweep-fuyao` invocation where no fields were provided. Respond by starting the interactive required-question flow. Required in order: task, branch, hp_specs. Ask only required prompts first (task, branch, hyperparameters), each with selectable options and explicit defaults shown. Do not dispatch yet.
</user_query>

Starting required-field collection for `/sweep-fuyao`.

Q1 `task` (required, default: `r01_amp`)
1) `r01_amp`
2) `r01_plus_amp`
3) `r01_v12_sa_amp`
4) `px5_amp`
5) Other (enter custom task name)

Q2 `branch` (required, default: `integrate/zhangny2-parallel-timeout`)
1) `integrate/zhangny2-parallel-timeout` (default)
2) `main`
3) `develop`
4) Other (enter custom branch name)

Q3 `hp_specs` (required, default suggestion: `seed=1,2,3`)
Format must be `param=value1,value2` (repeat as needed; at least one spec is required).
1) `seed=1,2,3`
2) `learning_rate=5e-4,3e-4;entropy_coef=0.001,0.005`
3) `num_envs=4096,8192;seed=10,20`
4) custom (enter your own `param=value1,value2`)

Reply with task choice, branch choice, and at least one `hp_specs` entry in order; no dispatch will happen yet.
